name: pnp-sharepoint-skills-style-high-contrast
title: Style: High Contrast
shortDescription: High Contrast accessibility style tokens for the list-styling skill. Maximum contrast ratios, larger fonts, thicker weights, and text indicators for WCAG compliance.
longDescription: High Contrast accessibility style tokens for the list-styling skill. Maximum contrast ratios, larger fonts, thicker weights, and text indicators for WCAG compliance.
Use when the user says 'high contrast,' 'accessible,' 'accessibility,' 'WCAG,' or 'easy to read.'

thumbnails.alt: High Contrast accessibility style applied to a SharePoint list

references.name: List Styling Engine
references.description: The companion skill that applies these style tokens to a SharePoint list.

references.name: Demo video
references.description: Walkthrough of the list-styling engine and supporting style token skills.
